key.name: gtk3-dark-theme
key.description: The GTK3 theme to apply when the system color scheme is set to "prefer-dark". Defaults to adw-gtk3-dark. If empty, falls back to Adwaita-dark.

key.name: gtk3-light-theme
key.description: The GTK3 theme to apply when the system color scheme is set to light. If empty, the gtk-theme setting is reset to the system default.

key.name: manage-icon-theme
key.description: Whether to also switch the icon theme when the color scheme changes.

key.name: icon-dark-theme
key.description: The icon theme to apply when the system color scheme is set to "prefer-dark". Leave empty to not change the icon theme in dark mode.

key.name: icon-light-theme
key.description: The icon theme to apply when the system color scheme is set to light. Leave empty to not change the icon theme in light mode.
